title: VCD Cannot Create Dump of Simple SystemVerilog File

features.name: dumpvars without arguments in SV2012 mode
features.description: Code should include a $dumpvars() call without arguments in SystemVerilog 2012 mode, which causes VCD dumping to fail when the compiler tries to dump the $unit package scope

features.name: empty $dumpvars call targeting all design scope
features.description: Code should include an empty argument list $dumpvars() that attempts to dump all variables in the design including $unit package scope

features.name: monitor_with_hex_format_in_dumpvars_context
features.description: Code should include a $monitor statement with hex format specifiers used alongside $dumpvars in an SV2012 design
features.snippet: $monitor("clock = %d, op1=0x%h8, op2=0x%h8, out = 0x%h8", clock, op1, op2, out);

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
